config.general.title: General
config.general.prefix.desc: Prefix for mod messages in chat. Use & for color codes (e.g., &a for light green)
config.general.custom_ranks.desc: Display custom cosmetic ranks for players (name colors, prefixes)
config.blacklist.title: Blacklist Settings
config.blacklist.enable.desc: Automatically kick blacklisted players from your party
config.blacklist.send_reason.desc: Send the kick reason in party chat when kicking
config.kick_messages.title: Kick Messages
config.kick_messages.blacklist.desc: Message sent when kicking a blacklisted player. Use {user}
config.kick_messages.class_filter.desc: Message sent when kicking due to class filter. Use {user}, {class}
config.kick_messages.secrets.desc: Message sent when kicking due to insufficient secrets. Use {user}, {secrets}, {required}
config.kick_messages.secrets_per_run.des: Message sent when kicking due to insufficient secrets per run. Use {user}, {ratio}, {required}, {secrets}, {runs}
config.kick_messages.kuudra_runs.desc: Message sent when kicking due to insufficient runs. Use {user}, {tier}, {runs}, {required}
config.requeue.title: Auto-Requeue
config.party_commands.title: Party Commands
config.party_commands.enable.desc: Allow party members to use !commands (!warp, !pt, !kick, etc.)
config.party_commands.friends_only.desc: Only friends can use party commands
config.party_commands.individual.title: Individual Commands
config.filters.title: Filters
config.filters.dungeons.title: Dungeons
config.filters.allow_archer.desc: Allow Archer class to join your party
config.filters.allow_berserker.desc: Allow Berserker class to join your party
config.filters.allow_mage.desc: Allow Mage class permissions and bypass option
config.filters.mage_bypass_tooltip: Bypass requirement check for Mage class
config.filters.allow_tank.desc: Allow Tank class to join your party
config.filters.allow_healer.desc: Allow Healer class to join your party
config.filters.secrets_threshold.desc: Toggle S or S/R to switch between Total Secrets and Secrets per Run modes.
config.filters.kuudra.title: Kuudra
config.filters.kuudra.runs.desc: Minimum runs count required for the selected tier
config.bypass.title: Bypass
config.bypass.friend.desc: Skip all checks for players in your friends list
config.bypass.guild.desc: Skip all checks for players in your guild
config.advanced.title: Advanced
config.advanced.language.desc: Select the language of the mod
config.advanced.telemetry.desc: Allow the mod to send your username and mod version to help the developer. No additional/private data is collected. If this option makes you uncomfortable in any way just disable it.
config.advanced.debug.desc: Enable debug logs (Required for the dev to understand your issue if you encounter a reproducible bug)
chat.kick.not_leader_thrower: §e§l/§4§l!§e§l\ §cWould have kicked §b§l{user}§c but you're not party leader.§7 (Thrower)
chat.kick.not_leader_class: §e§l/§4§l!§e§l\ §cWould have kicked §b§l{user}§c but you're not party leader. §7(Class: §c§l{class}§7)
chat.kick.not_leader_secrets: §e§l/§4§l!§e§l\ §cWould have kicked §b§l{user}§c but you're not party leader.§7 (Secrets: §c{current} §7< §a{required}§7)
chat.kick.not_leader_spr: §e§l/§4§l!§e§l\ §cWould have kicked §b§l{user}§c but you're not party leader.§7 (S/R: §c{current} §7< §a{required}§7)
chat.kick.not_leader_kuudra: §e§l/§4§l!§e§l\ §cWould have kicked §b§l{user}§c but you're not party leader.§7 (Kuudra {tier}: §c{current} §7< §a{required}§7)
chat.kick.warn_button.hover: §eClick to warn the party leader about this player
chat.kick.warn_retry_failed: §cFailed to resolve party leader after /pl. Are you sure you are in a party?
chat.help.add: §a─ §b{prefix} add <name> <reason> §7- Add user to the blacklist
chat.help.remove: §a─ §b{prefix} remove <name> §7- Remove user from the blacklist
chat.help.check: §a─ §b{prefix} check <name> §7- Check if user is on the blacklist
chat.help.scan: §a─ §b{prefix} scan §7- Scan blacklist for nickname changes
chat.help.import: §a─ §b{prefix} import <file> §7- Import a blacklist from a backup file
chat.help.requeue: §a─ §b{prefix} requeue <args> §7- Toggle auto-requeue or takes the argument : <cancelDT>
chat.blacklist.empty_hint: Your blacklist is empty. Add players with §b{prefix} add <username> <reason>
chat.scan.auto_complete_none: Auto-Scan completed. No changes to report!
chat.import.success: Import complete! Added: {added}, Skipped known players: {skipped}
chat.requeue.mute_prompt: §eI have sent the reminder §b{count} §etimes. Would you like me to stop?
chat.requeue.mute_button.hover: §eClick to stop announcing reminders in party chat
chat.requeue.solo_cancelled: §eRequeue cancelled: You're not in a party or playing Solo
chat.requeue.force_unavailable: Force requeue no longer available (Something changed)
chat.requeue.force_no_instance: Cannot force requeue: no instance info available
chat.api.ashcon_warning:
§4[IMPORTANT] §6I used §cAshcon's API §6as a last resort because the others weren't available. This API sometimes return outdated data! §7I highly recommend you to re run §b/pun scan §7in ≈24 hours. 
 §c(Repeat the process as much as you see this warning!)
